overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a traditional Japanese village at night. The scene features thatched-roof buildings, wooden walkways, and atmospheric mist with warm lantern lighting contrasting against the cool blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path beside a thatched-roof storehouse with sacks of goods stacked outside

entered.detail: traditional Japanese building with thick thatched roof and wooden walls
white sacks stacked on a wooden platform outside the storehouse
old wooden cart with wheels parked near the building
neatly stacked logs of firewood along the path
simple wooden post fence marking property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path beside a traditional thatched-roof storehouse. Sacks of goods and stacked firewood line the path, while a wooden fence is visible in the background. The scene is dimly lit by moonlight with a cool blue atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with wooden walkways and hanging lanterns

events.description: exits narrow path alongside building into open village square with wooden walkways
passes under a warm hanging lantern illuminating the wooden walkway with orange light

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center on wooden plank walkways, passing lit hanging lanterns

entered.detail: traditional Japanese paper lantern on a wooden post emitting warm orange light
elevated wooden plank path winding through the village
traditional wooden house with thatched roof in the village center
low stone wall marking property boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow path into an open village center with wooden walkways. Warm light from hanging lanterns contrasts with the cool night sky. The ground transitions from dirt to wooden planks as the character moves deeper into the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty village path with traditional houses and bamboo forest backdrop

events.description: mist becomes denser between the buildings, reducing visibility in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing through the misty village, passing various wooden structures with bamboo forest visible in the background

entered.detail: dense bamboo grove visible in the background beyond the village buildings

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a misty section of the village with wooden walkways. Bamboo forests become visible in the background, and the atmospheric mist creates a hazy ambiance. The character passes between traditional houses with stone walls and wooden fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge near bamboo forest with NPC

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching a villager sitting by the path
passes the villager and continues toward the bamboo forest edge

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a villager sitting by a house, heading toward the bamboo grove at the village edge

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the ground near a building, facing the path

entered.detail: villager in traditional clothing sitting near a house entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the edge of the village where a villager sits near a building. After passing the NPC, the character continues toward the dense bamboo forest that marks the village boundary. The wooden walkway continues through this transitional area between the built village and the wild bamboo grove.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet Japanese village at night, transitioning from a secluded dirt path into a misty residential center and finally toward a wild bamboo grove. It begins beside a traditional thatched-roof storehouse lined with firewood and sacks under a cool, moonlit blue atmosphere. As the character emerges from the narrow path, the scene opens into a village center where the ground shifts to wooden walkways illuminated by the warm glow of hanging lanterns. The camera then glides through a hazy, mist-filled section of the village, passing between stone walls and wooden fences as bamboo forests begin to appear in the distance. Finally, the path leads past a seated villager at the edge of the settlement before moving seamlessly from the built environment into the dense bamboo grove.
